test_objectives.title: Preview cart
test_objectives.failure_indicator: Fails --- bug here ## Error Type Console Error ## Error Message Cannot update a component (`Router`) while rendering a different component (`CheckoutPage`). To locate the bad setState() call inside `CheckoutPage`, follow the stack trace as described in https://react.dev/link/setstate-in-render at CheckoutPage (src/app/(shop)/checkout/page.jsx:385:12) ## Code Frame 383 |   // Guard: nếu không có selectedItemIds hợp lệ → redirect về cart (nếu không phải direct checkout) 384 |   if (mounted && isInitialized && isAuthenticated && !cartLoading && !isDirectCheckout && selectedItemIds.length === 0) { > 385 |     router.replace('/cart'); |            ^ 386 |     return null; 387 |   } 388 | Next.js version: 16.1.6 (Turbopack)
